result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 5:     EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS ha...
                                             ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: 
SELECT
    c.ownerid,
    c.id AS case_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_time_seconds
FROM
    "Case" AS c
LEFT JOIN
    casehistory__c AS ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
WHERE
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02 23:59:59' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    c.ownerid, c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate
HAVING
    COUNT(ch.id) = 1;
]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT
    c.ownerid,
    c.id AS case_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_time_seconds
FROM
    "Case" AS c
LEFT JOIN
    casehistory__c AS ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
WHERE
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02 23:59:59' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    c.ownerid, c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate
HAVING
    COUNT(ch.id) = 1;

args.query:
SELECT
    c.ownerid,
    c.id AS case_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_time_seconds
FROM
    "Case" AS c
LEFT JOIN
    casehistory__c AS ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
WHERE
    c.createddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02 23:59:59' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    c.ownerid, c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate
HAVING
    COUNT(ch.id) = 1;
